title: Principal SEO Specialist at Melorra Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal SEO Specialist at Melorra Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Melorra Capital India! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Melorra Capital India:
Melorra Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra Capital India!
